description: Weather Intelligence — aggregates METARs, TAFs, SIGMETs, AIRMETs, PIREPs, and TFRs with plain-language translation and route-specific risk assessment

hard_stops.label: Weather Below Company Minimums
hard_stops.logic: Current or forecast weather at departure, destination, or alternate is below operator-configured minimums per 14 CFR 135.219/225

hard_stops.label: SIGMET Active on Route
hard_stops.logic: Convective or volcanic SIGMET is active along the planned route of flight

hard_stops.label: TFR Active on Route
hard_stops.logic: Temporary Flight Restriction is active along the planned route — restricted airspace penetration prohibited without authorization

soft_flags.label: Marginal VFR Conditions
soft_flags.logic: Conditions are MVFR at departure, destination, or alternate — ceiling 1000-3000 AGL or visibility 3-5 SM

soft_flags.label: Weather Deteriorating
soft_flags.logic: TAF or trend analysis indicates conditions deteriorating toward minimums within the mission window

soft_flags.label: Severe Turbulence PIREP Nearby
soft_flags.logic: Pilot report of severe turbulence within 100nm of planned route and within 2 hours

soft_flags.label: Icing Advisory in Route
soft_flags.logic: AIRMET Zulu or CIP/FIP indicates icing conditions along the planned route at planned altitude
